clause_text: Any disputes arising under this agreement shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.
risk_reason: Foreign jurisdiction clause creates a practical barrier to litigation for the Saudi party. Saudi courts may assert jurisdiction regardless of this clause.
saudi_legal_note: المحاكم السعودية قد تنعقد اختصاصًا رغم وجود شرط الاختصاص الأجنبي خاصةً إذا كان محل التنفيذ داخل المملكة. شرط التحكيم في الرياض أنسب.
recommended_revision: Replace with: disputes shall be resolved by arbitration in Riyadh under the rules of the Saudi Center for Commercial Arbitration (SCCA). Alternatively refer to the competent Saudi Commercial Court.
related_regulation: Saudi Commercial Courts Law (Royal Decree M/93 1441H) | Arbitration Law (Royal Decree M/34 1433H)
notes: Standard boilerplate in foreign SaaS contracts that conflicts with Saudi legal practice

clause_text: The total liability of the Service Provider under this agreement shall not be limited in any way and shall include all direct indirect consequential and punitive damages without cap.
risk_reason: Unlimited liability exposure particularly for punitive damages may conflict with Saudi civil law principles and creates unsustainable commercial risk for the service provider.
saudi_legal_note: نظام المعاملات المدنية السعودي يجيز تحديد المسؤولية اتفاقاً ضمن حدود معقولة. التعويض التعسفي (Punitive Damages) غير معترف به كمفهوم مستقل في الفقه السعودي والتعويض يقدر بالضرر الفعلي.
recommended_revision: Replace with a liability cap tied to the total fees paid in the 12 months preceding the claim. Exclude punitive damages explicitly. Retain unlimited liability only for gross negligence and willful misconduct.
related_regulation: Saudi Civil Transactions Law (Royal Decree M/191 1443H) Arts. 173-180
notes: Common issue when adapting Western contracts without Saudi-specific review

clause_text: Client data may be stored and processed on servers located in the European Union. Service Provider may transfer Client data to any jurisdiction necessary for the provision of services.
risk_reason: Cross-border data transfer without a legal basis violates PDPL. No mention of data subject consent or adequacy determination or SDAIA authorization. Broad transfer clause with no geographic or purpose limitation.
saudi_legal_note: نظام حماية البيانات الشخصية (PDPL) يشترط مسوغاً قانونياً صريحاً لنقل البيانات الشخصية خارج المملكة. البند الحالي يفتقر لأي أساس قانوني ويعرض الشركة للمساءلة أمام سدايا.
recommended_revision: Revise to: (1) specify lawful basis for transfer per PDPL Arts. 29-30 (2) restrict transfer to jurisdictions with adequate protection or SDAIA-approved safeguards (3) prohibit use of data beyond contracted service delivery (4) add breach notification obligation within 72 hours.
related_regulation: Personal Data Protection Law PDPL (Royal Decree M/19 1443H) Arts. 29-30 | SDAIA Implementing Regulations
notes: PDPL compliance is a recurring gap in foreign cloud and SaaS contracts operating in Saudi Arabia
